title: Bridge Essay: Intersections of Psychedelics, Mystical Experiences, and Hypnosis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Intersections of Psychedelics, Mystical Experiences, and Hypnosis.** — Int J Clin Exp Hypn. PMID: 40982711. DOI: 10.1080/00207144.2025.2554387. The potential therapeutic benefits of psychedelic, mystical experiences, and peak spiritual experiences are of increasing interest among clinicians, researchers, and the public. Several studies have proposed potential parallels between the altered states of consciousness associated with psychedelics and hypnosis. Although there has been increased interest in psychedelics, mystical experiences, hypnosis, and non-ordinary states of consciousness, much remains unknown. The present special issue add...
